declarations.description: An editor plugin for GOOSE and SMV subscriber data binding.
declarations.name: OscdEditorSubscriberDatabinding

members.name: scopedElements
members.default: { 'oscd-icon': OscdIcon, 'oscd-outlined-segmented-button': OscdOutlinedSegmentedButton, 'oscd-outlined-segmented-button-set': OscdOutlinedSegmentedButtonSet, 'fcda-binding-list': FcdaBindingList, 'extref-ln-binding-list': ExtRefLnBindingList, 'oscd-scl-dialogs': OscdSclDialogs, }

declarations.name: getAssociatedDataSet
declarations.description:
Returns the DataSet referenced by a control block's `datSet` attribute.
The DataSet must be a sibling under the same LN0.

declarations.name: getAssociatedCommunication
declarations.description:
Returns the communication element associated with a control block.
The element is located in Communication \> SubNetwork \> ConnectedAP and matched
by iedName, apName, ldInst, and cbName.

declarations.name: getAssociatedSmvOpts
declarations.description: Returns the SmvOpts child element when editing a SampledValueControl.

declarations.name: isDataSetSingleUse
declarations.description:
Returns true if no other control block under the same LN0 references
the given DataSet. A single-use DataSet can be safely removed together
with its control block.

declarations.name: buildRemoveEdits
declarations.description:
Builds an EditV2 array that removes a control block and its associated
elements: the DataSet (if single-use) and its communication element.

declarations.name: getFcdaReferences
declarations.description: Builds a CSS attribute selector string from FCDA reference attributes.

declarations.name: getControlReferences
declarations.description: Builds a CSS attribute selector string from control reference attributes.

declarations.name: getSclSchemaVersion
declarations.description: Derives the SCL schema edition from the root element attributes.

declarations.name: getNameAttribute
declarations.description: Extracts the `name` attribute from an element.

declarations.name: getDescriptionAttribute
declarations.description: Extracts the `desc` attribute from an element.

declarations.name: compareNames
declarations.description: Locale-aware comparison of elements or strings by `name` attribute.

A sub element for showing all Ext Refs from a FCDA Element.
The List reacts on a custom event to know which FCDA Element was selected and updated the view.
declarations.name: ExtRefLnBindingList

declarations.description:
A sub element for showing all Goose/Sampled Value Controls.
A control can be edited using the oscd-scl-dialogs.
And when selecting a FCDA Element a custom event is fired, so other list can be updated.
declarations.name: FcdaBindingList

members.description: The control element that the context menu currently targets.

parameters.description: If true, return the first element found

parameters.description: The extRef SCL element in the subscribing IED.

members.name: subscribedElements
members.description: List holding all current subscribed Elements.

members.name: availableElements
members.description: List holding all current available Elements which are not subscribed.

members.name: currentSelectedIed
members.description: Current selected IED (when in Subscriber view)

members.name: currentUsedDataset
members.description: The current used dataset for subscribing / unsubscribing

declarations.name: sharedStyles
declarations.default: css` section { background-color: var(--mdc-theme-surface); transition: all 200ms linear; outline-color: var(--mdc-theme-primary); outline-style: solid; outline-width: 0px; opacity: 1; } h2 { color: var(--md-sys-color-on-surface); font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin: 0px; line-height: 48px; padding-left: 0.3em; transition: background-color 150ms linear; } abbr[title] { border-bottom: none !important; cursor: inherit !important; text-decoration: none !important; } oscd-list-item.control > div[slot='headline'] { font-weight: 500; } `
declarations.description: Common `CSS` styles used by DataTypeTemplate subeditors
